step.title: Profile current state
step.action: Analyze the codebase and any available architecture documents for performance-relevant patterns.
Identify current performance characteristics: response times, resource usage, throughput.

step.title: Identify bottlenecks
step.action: Look for common performance anti-patterns: N+1 queries, synchronous blocking, missing caching, large payloads.
Categorize bottlenecks by component and severity.

step.title: Recommend optimizations
step.action: For each bottleneck, recommend a specific optimization with expected impact.
Consider trade-offs: complexity vs. performance gain.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill all sections with findings and recommendations.
